name: B.C. Bow Contest
author: Poki
description: B.C. Bow Contest is a skill-based, bow shooting archery game created by Nitrome. Aim the targets by draggin the aim to find the perfect angle and power to shoot your arrow ! There are tons of levels in Bow Contest ! Shoot, and be precise ! Try to complete all the levels! Are you ready to be the ultimate archer? How to play: Drag and drop the left mouse click to aim Release to shoot About the creator: B.C. Bow Contest was created by Nitrome as a flash game, and later emulated in HTML5 by AwayFL for Poki. Play Nitrome's other flash games on Poki: Swindler 2 , Avalanche , Cave Chaos 2 , Enemy 585 , Silly Sausage , Swindler , Coil , Cold Storage , Twin Shot 2 , Bad Ice-Cream , Bad Ice-Cream 2 , Bad Ice-Cream 3 , Cave Chaos , Mutiny , Skywire , Twin Shot , Test Subject Green and Test Subject Blue
